2026-04-20T09:44:54.8837183Z hint: 	git config --global init.defaultBranch <name>
2026-04-20T09:44:54.8837857Z hint:
2026-04-20T09:44:54.8838441Z hint: Names commonly chosen instead of 'master' are 'main', 'trunk' and
2026-04-20T09:44:54.8839198Z hint: 'development'. The just-created branch can be renamed via this command:
2026-04-20T09:44:54.8839859Z hint:
2026-04-20T09:44:54.8840173Z hint: 	git branch -m <name>

2026-04-20T09:45:19.0148259Z [36;1m  echo "Detection will run: output_types=$OUTPUT_TYPES, has_patch=$HAS_PATCH"[0m
2026-04-20T09:45:19.0148665Z [36;1melse[0m
2026-04-20T09:45:19.0148913Z [36;1m  echo "run_detection=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-20T09:45:19.0149330Z [36;1m  echo "Detection skipped: no agent outputs or patches to analyze"[0m
2026-04-20T09:45:19.0149705Z [36;1mfi[0m
